title: Slipcraft
description: A mod that lets you construct strange magical machines and explore alien worlds.
body:
THIS MOD IS NO LONGER BEING WORKED ON

PLEASE READ:
this mod was made with the use of Mcreator when i had barely any idea on how to properly mod,
this will most likely be laggy and there may be bugs, there is not mutch documentation on this mod and i do not plan on adding any more since im no longer working on this mod.
I am leaving this mod up for those who want to check it out regardless.
But i highly recomend not using this in any large modpack or in long term worlds due to this and its incompleatness.

please check out my other mods instead.

You wake up, the sun in your eyes, its daytime but you know night will come fast. You have been through this song and dance countless times and you know what you need to do first, punch trees, get wood, build a shelter, a shelter that can hopefully one day be called home. As you run over to your nearest tree you trip over something. Something shiny, purple and blue, adorned by a gemstone and locking away countless stories, a scroll. you open the scroll confused and curious at what may be held within and your directives slightly change. Along side the basics of survival, building a shelter, and farming for food, you have been given insight into a new material... cosmicium. You have no idea what this stuff is what it can used for but the excitement of the one who wrote this scroll hints at its potential. you head off on your new journey to find this writer and find out what all of this will eventually lead up to. all you need to do now is follow in the footsteps of this ghost.

Slipcraft is a mod that has you build machines that can harness the magics of a new material called cosmicium. machines that can help out with mundane tasks, unlock the ability to craft and use magical wands, automate some things and tear open the fabric of reality into new and strange dimensions. This mod currently has 8 dimensions 4 of which can be progressed through, 3 that can explored but are still wip, and one that cant be explored in a survival playthrough.
Along with this the mod features 4 boss fights with 4 more still in the works.

When starting A new world you will be givin a slip scroll that can show you how to use most of the machines, equipment, and how to set up portals, all you need to do is toss in an item or block you want to learn more about into the scrolls only item slot.

This mod was made using Mcreator!
